/CAL:RULING ON 1603PC & 1604 HRG/DAWT/X:THE DEFENDANT IS IN NAPA STATE HOSPITAL/X:MEDIA REQUEST TO PHOTOGRAPH, RECORD OR BROADCAST IS FILED/ /X:ORDER ON MEDIA REQUEST TO PERMIT COVERAGE (DENIED) SIGNED BY JUDGE TERI JACKSON ON 11-5-07 IS FILED/ /THE COURT ORDERS THE FOLLOWING:/X:ALL MEDICAL RECORDS, INCLUDING SUBPOENAED MEDICAL RECORDS (ITEM #1, #2 &#3), EXHIBITS, PSYCHIATRIC REPORTS AND REPORTS FROM ALL OTHER AGENCIES INCLUDING POLICE REPORTS ARE ORDERED SEALED PURSUANT TO PC 1026, PC 1603 & PC 1604 (6 ENVELOPES TURNED IN TO ROOM 101 FOR SAFEKEEPING),/X:THE COURT FINDS THAT THE DEFENDANTHAS SUSTAINED HIS BURDEN OF PROOF TO BE RELEASED TO A COMMUNITY OUTREACH PROGRAM PURSUANT TO PEOPLE VS, CROSS,/X:THE DEFENDANT IS TO BE RELEASED TOANKA BEHAVIORAL HEALTH INCORPORATED, SOUTH POINT, 230 SOUTH GINA AVENUE, ELCAJON, CA, 92019, FAX # 619-593-7912, PHONE # 619-593-7909, CLINICAL DIRECTOR SHERRY WILKINS, THE DEFENDANT IS TO BE IN SOUTH POINT FOR A MINIMUM OF90 DAYS,/X:GOLDEN GATE CONREP IS TO PROVIDE MONTHLY REPORTS DIRECTLY TO THIS COURT,DEPARTMENT 29, JUDGE TERI L, JACKSON,/X:UPON RELEASE FROM SOUTH POINT, THE DEFENDANT IS TO BE RELEASED TO HARPERMEDICAL GROUP INC,, CENTRALVALLEY CONDITIONAL RELEASE PROGRAM (CONREP), 8785 FOLSOM BLVD, SACRAMENTO,CA 95826, FAX # 916-379-9400, PHONE # 916-379-9300, PROGRAM DIRECTOR MARK GRABAU, PH,D/X:WHILE IN CENTRAL VALLEY CONREP THE DEFENDANT'S RADIUS OF TRAVEL SHALL BEWITHIN SACRAMENTO,/X:THE COURT IS TO RECEIVE MONTHLY REPORTS FROM CENTRAL VALLEY CONREP FOR THE 1ST YEAR/ /X:THE COURT IS ORDERING THAT AHEARING BE HELD IF THERE ARE ANY DEVIATIONSIN THE DEFENDANT'S PRESCRIBED MEDICATION,/X:THE PEOPLE ARE TO NOTIFY THE VICTIMS ANY TIME THE DEFENDANT CANNOT BE LOCATED,/X:THE DEFENDANT IS TO HAVE GPS TRACKING FOR 1 YEAR,/X:THE PEOPLE ARE TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER,/DAWF/CONTD:STATUS REPORT RE TRANSPORT TO SOUTH POINT & STATUS OF DEFENDANT ON 12-7-07/

docket_entries.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PROGRESS REPORT RE SOUTH POINT RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM AND GPS STATUS REPORT,/DAWT/X:DEFENDANT IS CURRENTLY IN SOUTH POINT RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,/X:THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND THE SAN FRANCISCO DISTRICT ATTORNEY'SOFFICE DO NOT HAVE THE FINANCIAL RESOURCES TO FUND THE GPS TRACKING DEVICE & PROGRAM,/X:THE COURT ORDER ISSUED ON 11-05-2007 IS MODIFIED AS FOLLOWS=/X:THE REQUIREMENT FOR THE GPS TRACKING DEVICE IS SET ASIDE AND REPLACEDWITH THE STAR PROGRAM,/X:THE DEFENDANT WILL BE PLACED IN THE STAR PROGRAMIN SACRAMENTO,/X:THE DEFENDANT WILL BE ON 8 PM TO 8 AM CURFEW 7 DAYS A WEEK IN THE STAR PROGRAM,/X:THE DEFENDANT WILL BE REQUIRED TO REMAIN INSIDETHE RESIDENTIAL  FACILITY PROVIDED BY CENTRAL VALLEY CONREP BETWEEN THE HOURS OF 8 PM AND 8 AM,/X:FOR THE FIRST 4 MONTHS IN THE STAR PROGRAM, THE DEFENDANT TO  PARTICIPATE 5 DAYS OF THE WEEK IN A GROUP THERAPY PROGRAM,/X:ALL OTHER TERMS ORDERED ON 11-05-2007 REMAINS THE SAME EXCEPT AS INDICATED,//X:DA MICHAEL MENESINI TO NOTIFY THE VICTIM'S FAMILY OF THE MODIFICATIONS,//X:DEPARTMENT 29 CLERK TO NOTIFY  CENTRAL VALLEY CONDITIONAL RELEASE PROGRAM NAMELY,DR, JIM DUGAN (FORENSIC MENTAL HEALTH SPECIALIST) AND RHONDA LOVE(COMMUNITY PROGRAM DIRECTOR)AND CALIFORNIA MENTAL HEALTH -FORENSIC SERVIESNAMELY DR, MARK GRABAU (CONSULTING PSYCHOLOGIST &  PROGRAM LIAISON OF CONREP OPERATIONS) OF THE MODIFICATIONS VIA MAIL, FAX AND PHONE,/CONTD:WRITTEN PROGRESS REPORT FROM CENTRAL VALLEY CONDITIONAL RELEASE  PROGRAM  ON 09-12-08 AS TO THE DEFENDANT'S STATUS AND PROGRESS,/DAWF/

docket_entries.docketEntryComment: /CAL:RULING ON 1603PC & 1604 HRG/DAWT/X:THE DEFENDANT IS IN NAPA STATE HOSPITAL/X:MEDIA REQUEST TO PHOTOGRAPH, RECORD OR BROADCAST IS FILED/ /X:ORDER ON MEDIA REQUEST TO PERMIT COVERAGE (DENIED) SIGNED BY JUDGE TERI JACKSON ON 11-5-07 IS FILED/ /THE COURT ORDERS THE FOLLOWING:/X:ALL MEDICAL RECORDS, INCLUDING SUBPOENAED MEDICAL RECORDS (ITEM #1, #2 &#3), EXHIBITS, PSYCHIATRIC REPORTS AND REPORTS FROM ALL OTHER AGENCIES INCLUDING POLICE REPORTS ARE ORDERED SEALED PURSUANT TO PC 1026, PC 1603 & PC 1604 (6 ENVELOPES TURNED IN TO ROOM 101 FOR SAFEKEEPING),/X:THE COURT FINDS THAT THE DEFENDANTHAS SUSTAINED HIS BURDEN OF PROOF TO BE RELEASED TO A COMMUNITY OUTREACH PROGRAM PURSUANT TO PEOPLE VS, CROSS,/X:THE DEFENDANT IS TO BE RELEASED TOANKA BEHAVIORAL HEALTH INCORPORATED, SOUTH POINT, 230 SOUTH GINA AVENUE, ELCAJON, CA, 92019, FAX # 619-593-7912, PHONE # 619-593-7909, CLINICAL DIRECTOR SHERRY WILKINS, THE DEFENDANT IS TO BE IN SOUTH POINT FOR A MINIMUM OF90 DAYS,/X:GOLDEN GATE CONREP IS TO PROVIDE MONTHLY REPORTS DIRECTLY TO THIS COURT,DEPARTMENT 29, JUDGE TERI L, JACKSON,/X:UPON RELEASE FROM SOUTH POINT, THE DEFENDANT IS TO BE RELEASED TO HARPERMEDICAL GROUP INC,, CENTRALVALLEY CONDITIONAL RELEASE PROGRAM (CONREP), 8785 FOLSOM BLVD, SACRAMENTO,CA 95826, FAX # 916-379-9400, PHONE # 916-379-9300, PROGRAM DIRECTOR MARK GRABAU, PH,D/X:WHILE IN CENTRAL VALLEY CONREP THE DEFENDANT'S RADIUS OF TRAVEL SHALL BEWITHIN SACRAMENTO,/X:THE COURT IS TO RECEIVE MONTHLY REPORTS FROM CENTRAL VALLEY CONREP FOR THE 1ST YEAR/ /X:THE COURT IS ORDERING THAT AHEARING BE HELD IF THERE ARE ANY DEVIATIONSIN THE DEFENDANT'S PRESCRIBED MEDICATION,/X:THE PEOPLE ARE TO NOTIFY THE VICTIMS ANY TIME THE DEFENDANT CANNOT BE LOCATED,/X:THE DEFENDANT IS TO HAVE GPS TRACKING FOR 1 YEAR,/X:THE PEOPLE ARE TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER,/DAWF/CONTD:STATUS REPORT RE TRANSPORT TO SOUTH POINT & STATUS OF DEFENDANT ON 12-7-07/
